title: Novalife
description: A lightweight Vanilla+ modpack focused on performance, visuals, and quality-of-life improvements. No new items or gameplay changes — just smoother gameplay, better FPS, shader support, minimap, emotes, and clean inventory tools.
body:
NovaLife is a lightweight vanilla-friendly Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.21.10.

It focuses on smoother gameplay, better performance and cleaner visuals — without changing the core gameplay.

✔ Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore + ImmediatelyFast for top performance  
✔ Zoom, Freecam, Fullbright & BetterF3 for QoL improvements  
✔ Xaero's Worldmap + Minimap for navigation  
✔ Emotecraft + Sit! for fun multiplayer vibes  
✔ Simple Voice Chat for proximity voice chat support

No new blocks, no progression changes — just a clean, improved vanilla experience.
